notes: Refers to a notable or significant happening. Often used for important or memorable events.

sentences.german: Die Geburt meines Kindes war das schönste Ereignis meines Lebens.
sentences.english: The birth of my child was the most beautiful event of my life.

sentences.german: In der Stadt gab es gestern ein unerwartetes Ereignis.
sentences.english: There was an unexpected occurrence in the city yesterday.
